title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? ECIL South Asia Partners in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
